data.content: Files: src/lib/console-log-tap.ts (partial impl exists), src/instrumentation.ts (wire it here), src/lib/server-logger.ts (reuse resolveInteractionLogRoot), src/lib/interaction-logger.ts (resolveInteractionLogRoot defined here). Dev log at .foolery-logs/_server/YYYY-MM-DD/console.log, prod log at ~/.config/foolery/logs/_server/YYYY-MM-DD/console.log.
